identity.name: Riddhesh Dalal
identity.designation: Pre-Final Year @ IIT Patna | ML • NLP • Computer Vision | Sports AI | MVA'24
identity.department: B. Tech in Chemical Science and Technology
identity.tagline: Building intelligent systems through Machine Learning, Sports Analytics, Computer Vision, and Full-Stack Engineering.

biography: Pre-final year undergraduate at IIT Patna with interests in Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Sports Analytics and Full-Stack Engineering. Currently working as an Undergraduate Research Assistant under Prof. Sriparna Saha on SoccerNet-v3, building spatio-temporal graph learning, multi-object tracking, homography estimation and player contribution analysis systems. I enjoy translating research ideas into scalable AI applications and actively contribute through leadership roles across IIT Patna.

description: Conducting research on SoccerNet-v3 under Prof. Sriparna Saha.
Implemented multi-object tracking, homography estimation and game-state reconstruction pipelines.
Developed spatio-temporal Graph Neural Network models for tactical player interaction analysis.
Designed TactiGraph for player contribution modelling using spatial and contextual representations.
Research paper currently under preparation for submission.
Led development of the official website for Inter IIT Tech Meet 14.0.
Developed secure authentication, admin dashboard and registration portal.
Built React Native security application for participant verification.
Implemented JWT authentication, Helmet.js security and encrypted backend architecture.
Successfully deployed production-ready platform used during the event.

projects.title: Redrob Intelligent Candidate Discovery Engine
projects.description: Explainable AI candidate discovery and ranking engine built for large-scale recruitment.
highlights: Ranked 100,000 candidate profiles within 5 minutes on CPU.
Built 7-stage retrieval pipeline using BM25, FAISS, BGE embeddings and Cross-Encoder reranking.
Generated natural-language ranking explanations using Qwen2.5.
Identified and fixed a critical scoring bug restoring ranking quality.

projects.title: AI-Driven Cricket Team Predictor
projects.description: An end-to-end AI platform that predicts fantasy cricket player performance from historical ball-by-ball data and automatically constructs an optimized playing XI under Dream11 constraints using machine learning and integer optimization.
highlights: Processed over a decade of international and franchise cricket data using Cricsheet datasets.
Engineered more than 140 statistical features including recent form, venue influence, opponent strength, batting and bowling efficiency, rolling averages and contextual metrics.
Trained and benchmarked CatBoost, XGBoost and ensemble models for fantasy point prediction.
Implemented Integer Linear Programming using PuLP to generate the highest scoring valid Dream11 team.
Integrated SHAP Explainability for transparent player-wise prediction analysis.
Designed a FastAPI backend with Streamlit interface supporting model training, prediction, evaluation and CSV export.

projects.title: Sports Analytics Research Platform
projects.description: Research platform for tactical sports analysis using SoccerNet-v3 that combines computer vision, graph neural networks and game-state value estimation.
highlights: Implemented multi-object detection and tracking pipelines.
Mapped player coordinates into pitch coordinates using homography estimation.
Constructed spatio-temporal interaction graphs for every frame.
Designed graph neural network based tactical analysis pipeline.
Developed game-state value estimation framework for player contribution analysis.
Research currently under preparation for submission to an A* conference.

projects.title: Inter IIT Tech Meet 14.0 Official Website
projects.description: Official production website developed for Inter IIT Tech Meet 14.0 supporting contingent registration, event management and administration.
highlights: Developed scalable Next.js application.
Implemented secure authentication using JWT.
Designed responsive UI with GSAP animations.
Created dynamic problem statement management system.
Developed administrator dashboard.
Deployed production infrastructure on Vercel.

projects.title: Inter IIT Security Application
projects.description: React Native application for secure participant verification and entry-exit management during Inter IIT Tech Meet.
highlights: QR-based participant authentication.
Real-time entry and exit tracking.
Secure administrator verification.
Offline-first synchronization.
Firebase integration.

projects.title: Faculty Recruitment Portal
projects.description: A collaborative recruitment management platform developed with an IIT Ropar student for complete faculty recruitment workflows.
highlights: Applicant and administrator portals.
Secure login, signup and password reset.
Publication management.
Employment history management.
Academic profile generation.
REST API based architecture.
